title: Tabby ReForged
description: A Minecraft Forge mod that extends the player list that is shown when holding tab.
body:
Tabby ReForged Vanilla Minecraft limits the player list to 80 players and a restricted view of 20 rows at any given moment. However, Tabby ReForged, the confines are shattered, granting you the power to tailor these numerical thresholds to your exact specifications. Whether you opt for a sprawling array of 50 rows to immerse yourself in a sea of information or prefer a singular, focused perspective with just 1 row, the reins of customization rest firmly in your hands.

Tabby ReForged is client-sided only.

For Fabric, please download: https://modrinth.com/mod/tabby
